class="markdown-body"><h1>Overview</h1>
<p>This modpack recreates GTA V inside Minecraft as accurately and deeply as possible. It features realistic weapons, fully functional vehicles, a GTA-style interface, advanced animations, and a complete city map already included. Designed for immersion and flexibility.</p>
<hr>
<h1>Features</h1>
<p>Custom GTA-style main menu using FancyMenu</p>
<p>Realistic firearms with sound effects, recoil, and animations</p>
<p>Driveable cars, planes, tanks, ect...</p>
<p>Third-person GTA-like camera and freecam system</p>
<p>In-game voice chat fully supported</p>
<p>Integrated minimap and GPS (via JourneyMap)</p>
<p>GTA V city map included in the modpack</p>
<p>Enhanced graphics with shader support</p>
<p>Shaders are enabled by default.</p>
<p>Can be disabled manually if your system is not powerful enough.</p>
<hr>
<h1>Installation</h1>
<h2>GTA 5 Map</h2>
<p>The map is included with the modpack.
If it is missing or fails to load, you can download it manually <a href="https://mega.nz/file/ZFgEXL4A#KqcMlmjynlqWUwtdoewXDojejau39qKItB8R7j7SQAk" rel="noopener nofollow ugc">Here</a></p>
<p>The key for the mega file is :"KqcMlmjynlqWUwtdoewXDojejau39qKItB8R7j7SQAk"</p>
<p>Download GTA 5 Map
Place it in your saves/ folder and rename the world to exactly: GTA 5</p>
<h2>Optional: GTA V Menu Music</h2>
<p>To activate the original GTA V menu music, download the custom resource pack <a href="https://mega.nz/file/UBxGWYDb#JrY5fvcG6f0uBx93URNVE1nxYs7myqVWTCWlrR50lwM" rel="noopener nofollow ugc">Here</a></p>
<p>The key dor the mega file:"JrY5fvcG6f0uBx93URNVE1nxYs7myqVWTCWlrR50lwM"</p>
<p>Download GTA V Music Resource Pack
Place it in your resourcepacks/ folder and enable it from the Minecraft options.</p>
<hr>
<h1>Warnings and Requirements</h1>
<p>Heavy modpack: Allocate at least 6 to 8 GB of RAM</p>
<p>Shaders are optional and on by default.</p>
<p>Requires Forge 1.16.5</p>
<hr>
<h2>Mod Highlights</h2>
<p>(Full mod list available in the modpack files)</p>
<p>FancyMenu (UI and main menu customization)</p>
<p>Immersive Vehicles + UNU Packs</p>
<p>JourneyMap (GPS and minimap)</p>
<p>Voice Chat Integration</p>
<p>Player Animation Library, Emotecraft</p>
<p>Oculus + Embeddium (graphics performance)</p>
<p>BetterThirdPerson, Freecam</p>
<p>Clumps, Controlling, JEI,</p>
<p>and so much more</p>
</div></div></section></div></div></div><!----><!----><!--]--><!--]--></main><footer class="footer-brand-background experimental-styles-within border-0 border-t-[1px] border-solid" leaderboards for any data","# **Mitra Leaderboards**  \nA **flexible and high-performance leaderboard system** for Fabric servers. It computes and publishes leaderboards from **placeholders** (e.g. blocks mined, play time, kills, etc.), with optional **MongoDB** support to store and display **offline players**.\n\n---\n\n## ✨ Features\n- **Multiple leaderboards**: define as many *holders* as you want (e.g. `blocks_mined`, `time_played`, `kills`…).\n- **Native placeholders (pb4/Patbox)**: exposes values for **TAB**, HUDs, holograms, or any plugin/mod that reads placeholders.\n- **Per-holder update scheduling** (configurable in seconds).\n- **Online or offline mode**:  \n  - *Online-only*: TOP is computed with currently connected players (no DB).  \n  - *Offline tracking*: saves and queries from **MongoDB** for global TOPs.\n- **Asynchronous execution**: safe capture on the server thread, heavy work in async workers.\n- **Optimized for thousands of players**: efficient **TOP-K** selection, minimal I/O and CPU.\n- **Robust placeholder evaluation**: cleans values and prevents crashes if a placeholder fails.\n\n---\n\n## ✅ Requirements\n- **Fabric Loader** + **Fabric API** (server).  \n- **pb4 Placeholders (Patbox)** for placeholder resolution/registration.  \n- **MongoDB** *(requerid)*\n\n---\n\n## 📦 Installation\n1. Download **Mitra Leaderboards** and its requirements.  \n2. Place the `.jar` files in the `mods/` folder of the **server** (and client if you want HUDs).  \n3. Start the server to generate the config folders.  \n4. Configure `leaderboard.yml` (and `mongo.yml` if you plan to use offline tracking).  \n5. Restart.\n\n---\n\n## ⚙️ Configuration\n\n### `leaderboard.yml`\n\n```yml\nholders:\n  blocks_mined:\n    valueCheck: \"%mitra:mined_total%\"\n    update: 20\n    top: 10\n    trackOffline: false\n\n  time_played:\n    valueCheck: \"%mitra:play_time%\"\n    update: 30\n    top: 15\n    trackOffline: true\n```\n\n---\n\n# 🧩 Placeholders\n\nFor a **holder** named `blocks_mined`:\n\n---\n\n## 📏 Size and timers\n\n- `%mitra:leaderboard blocks_mined_size%` → number of entries.  \n- `%mitra:leaderboard blocks_mined_update_in_s%` → seconds until the next update.  \n- `%mitra:leaderboard blocks_mined_update_in_hms%` → remaining time in `HH:MM:SS`.  \n\n---\n\n## 🏆 TOP by position (N ≥ 1)\n\n- `%mitra:leaderboard blocks_mined_value_N%` → numeric value.  \n- `%mitra:leaderboard blocks_mined_player_N%` → player name.  \n- `%mitra:leaderboard blocks_mined_uuid_N%` → player UUID.  \n\n- `#1 %mitra:leaderboard blocks_mined_player_1%` — %mitra:leaderboard blocks_mined_value_1%\n- `#2 %mitra:leaderboard blocks_mined_player_2%` — %mitra:leaderboard blocks_mined_value_2%\n- `#3 %mitra:leaderboard blocks_mined_player_3%` — %mitra:leaderboard blocks_mined_value_3%\n\n---\n\n## 📜 Commands\n\n> *(Base command may differ depending on your setup; examples use `/lb`)*\n\n- **`/lb reload`**  \n  Reloads the `leaderboard.yml` configuration and reschedules all tasks.  \n  Useful when you change values in the config without restarting the server.\n\n- **`/lb recompute \u003Cholder>`**  \n  Forces an immediate recompute of the specified holder.  \n  Example: `/lb recompute blocks_mined` will update the ranking for the `blocks_mined` leaderboard instantly.\n\n- **`/lb list`**  \n  Displays a list of all currently active holders.  \n  Example output:  \n\n---\n\n## 👨‍💻 simple tool that broadcasts an existing Geyser/Bedrock server over Xbox Live.","# MCXboxBroadcast\n[![License: GPL-3.0](https://img.shields.io/github/license/MCXboxBroadcast/Broadcaster)](LICENSE)\n[![Build Release](https://github.com/MCXboxBroadcast/Broadcaster/actions/workflows/release.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/MCXboxBroadcast/Broadcaster/actions/workflows/release.yml)\n[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1139621390908133396?label=discord&color=5865F2)](https://discord.gg/Tp3tA2kdCN)\n\nA simple tool that broadcasts an existing [Geyser](https://github.com/GeyserMC/Geyser)/Bedrock server over Xbox Live.\n\nThis shows up to the authenticated accounts friends in-game as a joinable session and then anyone thats friends with someone who joined through that method will also see the session as joinable ingame.\n\n![Example screenshot](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/5401186/159083033-b965bfba-de17-4708-8979-1f33bfd5fa28.png)\n\n# DISCLAIMER\nYou use this project at your own risk, the contributors are not responsible for any damage or loss caused by the software. We suggest you use an alt account for running the tool in case the account is banned as we emulate some features of a client which may or may not be against TOS.\n\n## Features\n - Syncing of MOTD and other server details\n - Automatic friend list management\n - Easy Geyser integration (as an extension)\n - Shows as online and playing Minecraft in the Xbox app and website\n - Multi-account support\n - Web manager for larger networks\n - Uploading of a custom image for the account (see below for more info)\n\n## Pterodactyl Panel\nThere is an egg for easy instance creation supplied for [Pterodactyl Panel](https://pterodactyl.io/), this being `egg-m-c-xbox-broadcast.json`\n\n## Docker\nThere is a docker image available for the standalone version of the tool, this can be found at `ghcr.io/mcxboxbroadcast/standalone:latest`\n\n```bash\ndocker run --rm -it -v /path/to/config:/opt/app/config ghcr.io/mcxboxbroadcast/standalone:latest\n```\n\n## Installation\n### Extension\n1. Download the latest release file `MCXboxBroadcastExtension.jar`\n2. Drop the extension into the Geyser `extensions` folder\n3. Restart the server\n4. Wait for the extension to start and present you with an authentication code\n   - `To sign in, use a web browser to open the page https://www.microsoft.com/link and enter the code XXXXXXXX to authenticate.`\n5. Follow the link and enter the code\n6. Login to the account you want to use\n7. Follow the account on Xbox LIVE\n8. Check the friends tab ingame and you should see the server listed\n\n### Standalone\n1. Download the latest release file `MCXboxBroadcastStandalone.jar`\n2. Start the jar file using `java -jar MCXboxBroadcastStandalone.jar`\n3. Wait for the extension to start and present you with an authentication code\n    - `To sign in, use a web browser to open the page https://www.microsoft.com/link and enter the code XXXXXXXX to authenticate.`\n4. Follow the link and enter the code\n5. Login to the account you want to use\n6. Follow the account on Xbox LIVE\n7. Edit the `config.yml` to have the correct ip and port for the target server\n8. Restart the tool\n9. Check the friends tab ingame and you should see the server listed\n\n## Manager\nThere is a web manager available for donators. After joining the relevent [GitHub sponsors](https://github.com/sponsors/rtm516) tier you will be able to access its builds at https://github.com/MCXboxBroadcast/Manager/releases\n\nNote: This also requires a MongoDB instance to be running\n\n\u003Cdetails>\n   \u003Csummary>Screenshots\u003C/summary>\n\n   ![Bots view](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/e4760c93-a146-45b9-b029-fd3c5c6e7bea)\n   ![Bot info](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/462f1d8b-c8ab-42e0-ab0e-cb335fc00ab4)\n   ![Bot options](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/f603d51f-f59e-4a49-b2a5-ffeb074109e8)\n   ![Server options](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/e203eac3-7190-4510-9f5b-ef87de507cab)\n   ![Manager settings](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/11f85c70-9b50-4039-bddb-961833b7d11e)\n\u003C/details>\n\n## Custom Image\n![Custom image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/b00832fd-8fa6-4c7a-b764-342bcf6fc037)\n\nYou can add a custom image to the profile page for the account by placing a `screenshot.jpg` in the same directory as the `config.yml`.\n\nThe best settings for this image are `1200x675`, quality `90` and chroma subsampling `4:2:0`.\n\nThis can take a few minutes to update on the Xbox Live servers and show ingame.\n\n## Commands\nFor the extension version prefix with `/mcxboxbroadcast`\n\n| Command | Description |\n| --- | --- |\n| `exit` (Standalone Only) | Exits the program |\n| `restart` | Restarts the tool |\n| `dumpsession` | Dumps the current session data to files for debugging |\n| `accounts list` | Lists the accounts that are currently in use and their followers count |\n| `accounts add \u003Csub-session-id>` | Adds an account to the list of accounts to use |\n| `accounts remove \u003Csub-session-id>` | Removes an account from the list of accounts to use the way farmland blocks can be hydrated, and grass, dirt, or sand blocks can be hydrated to allow sugarcane to be placed on them.\n\n## Farmlands\n\nFarmland blocks can now be hydrated by water blocks below them, in a 2 block radius one block below and around the farmland block.\n\n## Sugarcane\n\nGrass, dirt, or sand blocks that have a block of water or frosted ice directly below them can now have These exploits are commonly used by players to gain unfair PvP advantages while gliding with Elytra by rapidly switching hotbar slots.\n\nThe plugin actively monitors hotbar switch timing at millisecond precision while a player is gliding with Elytra. If suspicious behavior is detected, the system applies a progressive punishment system: warning, temporary PvP restriction, and finally an automatic ban if violations continue. All thresholds, timers, and punishments are fully configurable via the config file.\n\nAntiElytraTarget also blocks firework-based Elytra PvP exploits, preventing players from dealing damage using fireworks while flying. Punished players are temporarily unable to attack, and any attack attempts during punishment are cancelled automatically.\n\nThe plugin provides real-time staff alerts, admin commands for monitoring and clearing player data, and Discord webhook integration for logging warnings, punishments, and bans externally. Visual and sound effects enhance clarity when punishments are applied.\n\nBuilt with asynchronous tasks and optimized data handling, AntiElytraTarget is performance-friendly, scalable, and suitable for competitive PvP servers that value fair gameplay and server You can force the edit by granting `standin.edit-anything` and `standin.convert-anything`. This will allow for\nediting ANY supported entity, including ones spawned by plugins, which may lead to unexpected behavior.\n\n### Entity replacement\n\nReplace armor stands to other entities such as mannequins and (in the future) display entities.\n\n`standin.change_type.\u003Centity_type>` - Permission that allows changing to specified entity type (only if it's supported).\n\nMiddle click (pick entity action) on most entities will display a dialog allowing for changing entity type. This\ncurrently [will NOT work for mannequins](https://github.com/PaperMC/Paper/issues/13340). Alternatively you can open the\nedit menu with `shift + right click` on the entity and choosing \"Change type\" option.\n\n\n### Entity manipulation\n\nManipulate properties of entities, such as setting player profiles on mannequins, making armor stands invisible and more.\n\nEdit menu can be opened with `shift + right click` on the entity.\n\n`standin.edit.\u003Centity_type>` - Permission that allows editing specified entity type (only if it's supported.).\n\n## Future\n\nPlugin is currently in early development and will evolve to include more features such as:\n- Manipulating armor stand parts individually\n- Preset armor stand poses\n- Allowing more entity types for replacement (text display, item display, block display)\n- Possibly simple AI for mannequins (big question mark on this one)\n- Whatever gets suggested and will not be pain to implement\n","2025-11-23T19:41:06.491092Z","2026-03-03T19:11:57.658910Z","2025-11-24T01:58:35.629033Z","2025-11-23T20:57:47.158920Z",{"id":30432,"name":30433,"url":4},"GPL-2.0-only","GNU General Checkpoints","Transform campfires into personal respawn points! 1.21.x","Right-click any lit campfire to set it as your checkpoint. When you die within range, you'll respawn at your nearest campfire instead of world spawn.\n\nFeatures:\n🔥 Simple Setup – Right-click a lit campfire to create a checkpoint\n\n⚰️ Smart Respawning – Respawn at the closest checkpoint within configurable radius\n\n🔄 Auto-Extinguish – Campfires extinguish after use (configurable) (can relight with flint & steel, or extinguish yourself with a shovel)\n\n📍 Multiple Checkpoints – Set several checkpoints across your world\n\n🛡️ Override Protection – Confirmation required when replacing nearby checkpoints\n\n🔔 Real-time Notifications – Get alerts when checkpoints are lit, extinguished, or destroyed\n\n\nCommands:\n\n- /cc list - View all your checkpoints\n\n- /cc delete \u003Cindex> - Remove a checkpoint\n\n- /cc info - Show plugin info and stats\n\n- /cc reload - Reload configuration\n\nPermissions:\n\n- campfirecheckpoints.use - Create and use checkpoints - Everyone\n\n- campfirecheckpoints.reload - Reload plugin config - OP\n\n- campfirecheckpoints.admin - Full admin access - OP\n\nConfiguration:\n\n- Radius – How far from death to search for checkpoints\n\n- Extinguish on respawn – Toggle campfire extinguishing\n\n- Max Auto Attack","A port of Luky005's Simple auto attack mod (with afk keybind)","# Simple Auto Attack\n\n# THIS IS A FORK!\n\nThis mod was originally created by Luky005!\n\n[Original Mod!](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-auto-attack)\n\nSimple Auto Attack makes holding the attack button auto attack entities you're aiming at.\n\n## Description\n\nSimple Auto Attack is a Minecraft Fabric mod designed to automate the melee combat process. It allows players to perform automatic attacks when an entity is within range of the player's crosshair. This mod ensures that players can continue their combat without having to manually click the attack button repeatedly, making fighting more fluid and efficient. However, **use this mod responsibly** and do not use it on multiplayer servers unless allowed by the server's rules.\n\n## Features\n\nMakes the combat similar to the combat snapshots and adds some QOL features.\n\n- **Automatic Attack** when weapon cooldown is finished and aiming at entity\n- **Attack through grass**\n- **No attack resetting** doens't hit grass or blocks, which makes cave combat easier\n- **Prevent block breaking** (with swords, tridents and the mace), prevents attack resetting\n- **AFK Keybind** Used for mob grinders or farms when afking.\n\nConfigureable with [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)\n  \n## Usage\n\n1. Install [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/use/) and [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)\n2. Download this mod and place it in your Minecraft mods folder.\n3. Launch Minecraft and enjoy!\n\n## Special Thanks\n- vin35's [autoattack](https://github.com/vin350/AutoAttack) for code inspiration\n- Luky005's [AutoAttack](https://github.com/Luky05005/Simple_Auto_Attack) for code base\n\n## Details\nPrevents block breaking when holding items with the SWORD tag or items that have trident or mace in their name, so it should support most modded weapons.\n\n## Warning\n\n⚠️ **Do not use this mod on multiplayer servers as it might be considered a cheat.**\n\nUsing this mod on public servers might trigger the anticheat and result in a ban. plug-in can create and delete transmission points through instructions, and has a more convenient gui to display its own transmission points.","## Features\n\n- ✅ **GUI Interface** - Beautiful graphical interface with pagination support\n- ✅ **Command System** - Complete command support for creating, deleting, and listing teleport points\n- ✅ **Configuration File** - Fully customizable configuration including messages, delays, and GUI settings\n- ✅ **Hot Reload** - Reload configuration without server restart\n- ✅ **Teleport Delay** - Configurable teleport delay with movement cancellation\n- ✅ **Permission System** - Complete permission node support\n- ✅ **Clean Code** - Follows Java coding standards with clear structure\n\n## Installation\n\n1. Ensure your server is running Spigot 1.21.5\n2. Copy the generated `SetHome-1.0.0.jar` to your server's `plugins` folder\n3. Restart the server or use `/reload` command\n4. Edit `plugins/SetHome/config.yml` to customize settings\n\n## Commands\n\n| Command | Description | Permission |\n|---------|-------------|------------|\n| `/sethome gui` | Open teleport points GUI | `sethome.use` |\n| `/sethome create \u003Cname>` | Create teleport point at current location | `sethome.create` |\n| `/sethome delete \u003Cname>` | Delete specified teleport point | `sethome.delete` |\n| `/sethome list` | List all teleport points | `sethome.use` |\n| `/sethome reload` | Reload configuration file | `sethome.reload` |\n\nAliases: `/sh`, `/home`\n\n## Permissions\n\n- `sethome.use` - Use teleport function (default: all players)\n- `sethome.create` - Create teleport points (default: all players)\n- `sethome.delete` - Delete teleport points (default: all players)\n- `sethome.reload` - Reload configuration (default: OP)\n- `sethome.admin` - Administrator permission (includes all permissions)\n\n## Configuration\n\nThe configuration file is located at `plugins/SetHome/config.yml` and supports customization of:\n\n- Plugin prefix and messages\n- Teleport delay time\n- Require standing still option\n- GUI title and size\n- All prompt messages\n\nUse `/sethome reload` after modifying the configuration.","2026-02-04T09:30:02.752214Z","2026-02-28T05:32:04.356665Z","2026-02-05T00:17:19.479640Z","2026-02-04T13:57:49.527532Z",{"id":30025,"name":30026,"url":4},90,[31,304],[],[330,402,418],[30757,30758],"Mwp8wbPj","7HhZ4GiL","https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VcuEFmF8/4d26339ed0b1ec3f8f0ecbbd404ffbae2b2ebeed_96.webp",[],[],15188121,"FXZuwD4l",{"client_side":29916,"server_side":29917,"game_versions":30765,"id":30766,"slug":30767,"project_type":32,"team":30768,"organization":4,"title":30769,"description":30770,"body":30771,"body_url":4,"published":30772,"updated":30773,"approved":30774,"queued":30775,"status":29904,"requested_status":29904,"moderator_message":4,"license":30776,"downloads":30777,"followers":29932,"categories":30778,"additional_categories":30779,"loaders":30780,"versions":30781,"icon_url":30786,"issues_url":4,"source_url":4,"wiki_url":4,"discord_url":30787,"donation_urls":30788,"gallery":30791,"color":30792,"thread_id":30793,"monetization_status":29948},[755,707,704,674,626,584,575,569,524,518,472],"VcL43RP3","cobbleregions","lYkR73NC","CobbleRegions","Server-side Cobblemon sidemod that adds region-based level caps with per-player progression.","# CobbleRegions\n\nServer-side Cobblemon sidemod that adds region-based level caps with per-player progression.\n\nEach Minecraft world/dimension is assigned to a Region. Every Region has its own ordered cap track\n(for example: 14 -> 22 -> 28). Players can travel freely, but a Pokemon can never level past the\ncap currently unlocked in its origin Region.\n\n## Core Behavior\n\n- The player's current Region is based on their dimension/world.\n- The active cap is the current unlocked cap of that Region.\n- Each Pokemon has a persistent Origin Region (caught/hatched/received).\n- EXP is blocked so Pokemon cannot exceed their Origin Region cap, even in higher-cap Regions.\n\n## Config\n\nConfig is stored at `config/cobbleregions.json` on the server.\n\nExample:\n\n```json\n{\n  \"battleDisallowOverCapSendOut\": true,\n  \"battleOverCapSendOutMessage\": \"\u003Cred>Over-cap Pokemon cannot be sent out in battle: {pokemon_list}\u003C/red>\",\n  \"battleInsufficientCapPokemonMessage\": \"\u003Cred>Battle canceled: you need at least {required} non-fainted Pokemon within your current cap.\u003C/red>\",\n  \"battleInsufficientCapPokemonReason\": \"\u003Cred>Not enough cap-legal Pokemon are available to start this battle.\u003C/red>\",\n  \"regions\": [\n    {\n      \"id\": \"region_a\",\n      \"dimensions\": [\"minecraft:overworld\"],\n      \"caps\": [14, 22, 28, 40],\n      \"capMessages\": {\n        \"14\": \"Level cap reached for this region.\",\n        \"22\": \"Another cap reached.\"\n      }\n    },\n    {\n      \"id\": \"region_b\",\n      \"prerequisite\": \"region_a\",\n      \"prerequisiteMessage\": \"Complete {prerequisite} before leveling in {region}.\",\n      \"dimensions\": [\"minecraft:the_nether\"],\n      \"caps\": [14]\n    }\n  ]\n}\n```\n\nIf a Region has no caps configured, it is treated as unlimited.\n\n`battleDisallowOverCapSendOut` defaults to `false`. When `true`, CobbleRegions removes over-cap Pokemon from player battle rosters at battle start. If that leaves too few non-fainted Pokemon for the format, the battle is canceled.\n\nBattle enforcement messages are configurable with MiniMessage:\n- `battleOverCapSendOutMessage` uses `{pokemon_list}`.\n- `battleInsufficientCapPokemonMessage` uses `{required}`.\n- `battleInsufficientCapPokemonReason` uses `{required}`.\n\n## Commands\n\nCommand access uses permission node `cobbleregions.command.regions` (defaults to permission level 2).\nOptional progress commands use permission node `cobbleregions.command.regions.progress`.\n\n- `/regions` opens the admin UI for region management.\n- `/regions progress get \u003Cplayer> \u003Cregion>` shows a player's cap for the region.\n- `/regions progress set \u003Cplayer> \u003Cregion> \u003Ccap>` sets a player's cap value for the region.\n- `/regions progress advance \u003Cplayer> \u003Cregion>` advances to the next cap.\n- `/regions progress reset \u003Cplayer> \u003Cregion>` resets to the first cap.\n- `/regions progress complete \u003Cplayer> \u003Cregion>` sets progress to the final cap.\n\n## API\n\nThe `RegionProgressApi` class provides programmatic progress control for other mods or integrations.\n\nNotes:\n- Caps must be strictly increasing.\n- Origin Region is set automatically when a Pokemon is captured, hatched, or gained.\n- Progress set requires a cap value that exists in the region's caps list.\n- A region can define a prerequisite; players cannot gain XP in that region until the prerequisite region is completed.\n- Messages support MiniMessage formatting and `{cap}`, `{region}`, `{prerequisite}`, `{pokemon}` placeholders.\n- The admin UI opens a region list; use Create to enter an id in chat, left-click to edit, right-click to delete.\n- The region edit screen manages dimensions, caps, cap messages, and player progress.\n","2026-02-11T03:35:32.494002Z","2026-02-20T15:26:37.241622Z","2026-02-11T07:13:23.995414Z","2026-02-11T03:56:37.813427Z",{"id":30025,"name":30026,"url":4},98,[31,135,304],[176,212,317],[347,386],[30782,30783,30784,30785],"JOw36uLg","W2TWK0hf","R6lsELH8","k1Y84jCZ","https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VcL43RP3/b8eb3f89652e9d5d7d55eac962484dc0f83cc35f.png","https://discord.gg/kMqFJYBHF6",[30789],{"id":3057,"platform":30577,"url":30790},"https://paypal.me/EarthMCDevelopment?country.x=US&locale.x=en_US",[],16387332,"9cUE0YQo",{"client_side":30795,"server_side":29917,"game_versions":30796,"id":30797,"slug":30798,"project_type":32,"team":30799,"organization":4,"title":30800,"description":30801,"body":30802,"body_url":4,"published":30803,"updated":30804,"approved":30805,"queued":30806,"status":29904,"requested_status":29904,"moderator_message":4,"license":30807,"downloads":30808,"followers":30809,"categories":30810,"additional_categories":30811,"loaders":30812,"versions":30813,"icon_url":30834,"issues_url":30835,"source_url":4,"wiki_url":4,"discord_url":4,"donation_urls":30836,"gallery":30837,"color":30893,"thread_id":30894,"monetization_status":29948},"optional",[876,804,798,761,755,707,704,674],"Vd5fJqk8","advanced-mobs","cKLRgfAQ","Advanced \n5%(default) gained various special abilities.  \nTheir special abilities will become stronger as the number of special mobs killed by players increases and time passes.  \n\n###  Enderman:\nGive player.  \n###  Evoker:\nTeleport when attacked.  \nSummon faster fangs.  \nSome of them summon flames and zombies instead fangs and vex.\n###  Wither:\nSummon Wither Skeleton when hurt.  \nSummon Wither Skull surrounding itself when its health drops below half.   \n###  Ender Dragon:\nSummon End Crystal on Dragon Breath.  \n\n## Commands:\nYou can access a chat based configuration menu by communication system using unique letter systems.\n\n# Chats & Letters\n### Local chat\nLocal chat works within a radius (64 blocks by default) of the player. The /me (action) command works the same way.\n\n![local chat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d152dfb0b380763b7bcbe7e0f9250ae1e315911c.png)\n\n### Global chat\nGlobal chat works across the entire map, and by default, it requires a letter, which the player must have in their inventory to send. It works similarly.\n\n![global chat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf3b03f922d3240b3cae192a6a1020a964fe93a1.png)\n\n### Letters\nOne letter is required to send one global or private message in chat. This significantly changes the gameplay, forcing players to write more thoughtfully and increasing the value of paper. _This feature can be disabled!_\n![craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dcdfca723c3b80fbd61b339aa2ac6de931a33eb3.png)\n\n# Commands\n\nMute system:\n```\n/mute \u003Cplayer> GLOBAL/ALL hours\n/unmute adds the 1.13+ suggestion box to Minecraft 1.8.9, enhancing chat with modern autocompletion for commands and player names.","# BackportedCompletions\n\nBackportedCompletions is a Minecraft mod that brings the 1.13+ suggestion box/autocomplete feature to Minecraft 1.8.9. This mod enhances the chat experience by providing a modern, user-friendly suggestion box for commands and player names, similar to newer versions of Minecraft.\n\n## Screenshots\n\n### Suggestion Box in Action\n![backportedcompletions_actions](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/c6eba221-911a-43b3-95f1-5e93025b9717)\n\n\n### Suggestion Box mouse scrolling\n![backportedcompletions_scroll](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/ca117da3-f517-4467-b2fc-2d062f306b4d)\n\n### Autocomplete Example\n![backportedcompletions_box](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/39851c61-8c7a-43e8-a675-d6272513cb7d)\n\n\n## Features\n- **1.13+ Style Suggestion Box**: Implements the modern autocomplete UI for commands and player names.\n- **Customizable Behavior**: Supports case sensitivity and matching options (e.g., match start only).\n- **Smooth Integration**: Works seamlessly with Minecraft 1.8.9's chat system.\n- **Debounced Autocomplete Requests**: Reduces unnecessary server requests for better performance.\n- **Mouse and Keyboard Support**: Navigate suggestions using arrow keys, tab, or mouse clicks.\n\n## Installation\n1. Download the mod's `.jar` file\n2. Place the `.jar` file in your Minecraft `mods` folder.\n3. Ensure you have a compatible version of [Minecraft Forge](https://files.minecraftforge.net/) installed for Glass","No more annoying texture lines on the glass that obstruct the view - only a clean and clear look.","**Clearest Glass** is an elegant, minimalist pack that removes all pixel noise and stripes from the surfaces of glass blocks, making them smooth and clean. Block borders retain their color but gain a crisp black outline for better visual definition. Perfect for modern builds and clean lines.\n\n### Download & Installation\n1. Download the file - Click the Files tab above and select the latest version.\n2. Place in your resourcepacks folder - In-game, go to Options -> Resource Packs -> Open resource pack folder.\n3. Move and activate - Move the downloaded .zip archive into the opened folder, then select texture pack from the list of available packs.\n- For the best effect (Optional): Install OptiFine and enable Connected Textures in Video Settings (Quality) or usse Continuity/Fusion mod. This will remove visible seams between blocks, creating the illusion of one large, seamless window or wall.\n\n### Main Features\n- Clean Surfaces: All pixelated stripes and noise have been removed from the surfaces of regular glass, tinted glass, and glass panes.\n- Crisp Black Borders: Block frames are now a deep black, improving their visibility and definition in structures.\n- Stylistic Integrity: Blocks do not become completely invisible but retain their in-game essence with a polished, minimalist look.\n- OptiFine Enhanced: For the ultimate seamless experience, use with OptiFine's Connected Textures feature.\n\n### Compatibility\n- Minecraft Versions: The pack is updated for all versions from the introduction of tinted glass (1.17) up to the latest stable release (1.20.4 and above).\n- Mods: Compatible with mods that add new glass blocks using standard vanilla texture templates.\n- Shaders & OptiFine: Recommended for use with OptiFine to access Connected Textures. Fully compatible with major shader packs (BSL, SEUS, Complementary).\n\n### Changelog\nInitial release. Removed \"noise\" from all vanilla glass blocks and panes, set borders on default glass to black.\n\n### License & Rights\n\nThis project is licensed under the GNU General Public License v3.0 (GPLv3).\n\nYou are free to use, modify, and share this texture pack.\n\nIf you create a derivative work (an edited pack, a compilation), you must distribute it under the same GPLv3 license and make its source textures publicly available.\n\nCopyright for the original textures is held by UnderStudioGroup © 2024.\n\nDisclaimer: This project is not an official Mojang Studios or Microsoft product. Only the host needs to have this installed for it to work!\nIf you have it installed and join a server, nothing happens.**\n\n## **Loot fountains**\n\n- Trial spawners and chests will dispense considerably more items (increased with luck), making them look like loot fountains!\n\n\n\n## **More loot:**\n\n- All chests, barrels, spawners and trial chests will have more items inside them\n- Increased loot variety (including iron, gold and copper ingots, blocks related to the trial chambers, rare items, etc)\n- Luck effect increases loot from all sources\n\n## **Some of the loot:**\n\n- Good equipments and tools are rare, but they exist\n- Small (very small) chance of getting mending books, so you don't need to interact with those pesky villagers\n- XP bottles! They aren't really OP and, unless you get super lucky, you'll just find a couple\n- Bucket of axolotl (I put it there because I can, but it's super rare)\n- Milk buckets (rare, but you can get rid of annoying effects now)\n- Super rare Netherite Scrap and Smithing Template (rarer than the Mace)\n\n## **This can make it harder for you to get a Mace!**\n\nI recomend to use this mod/datapack together with something like Revault, Trial Vault Restock, NoVaultLimit, etc, since that will allow you to get loot multiple times from the same vault. All of these mods are different and it's personal preference which one you choose. Have fun :)\n\n\n**IF (AND ONLY IF) you know what you are doing, you can edit and tweak the datapack as much as you want, to suit your preffered Trial Chambers experience and needs :)**\n\n\n\n**In case you want to edit it, some stuff you need to know:**\n- **\"Weight\":** The chance of stuff appearing (1 = super rare | 100 = super extremely common)\n- **\"Rolls\":** The number of items that will appear from a chest, spawner, etc\n- **\"Bonus Rolls\":** Number of extra items that you get if you have the Luck potion effect\n- If you really want to change everything, there's a pretty good and Better Vanilla","A vanilla-focused Minecraft modpack that improves performance, usability and clarity without changing core gameplay.\nIncludes optimization mods, essential APIs and carefully selected QoL features.","# Fast & Better Vanilla\n\n## Overview\n\n**Fast & Better Vanilla** is a **lightweight client-side modpack** designed to enhance the raw Vanilla Minecraft experience. It focuses on **performance optimization**, **improved usability**, **UI clarity**, and **practical in-game tweaks**. This pack aims to make Vanilla Minecraft **faster, cleaner, and more enjoyable**, without altering core gameplay mechanics or server interactions.\n\nUnlike feature-heavy modpacks or aggressive optimization packs, Fast & Better Vanilla takes a **balanced approach**: every included mod is carefully selected to improve the Vanilla experience, from performance enhancements and chat tools to optional visual improvements and quality-of-life tweaks.\n\n---\n\n## Important Notice\n\n**This modpack is intended for private use only.**\n\nUse on public servers may result in bans. The modpack creator assumes **no responsibility** for damages, data loss, or issues caused by usage. Use at your own risk.\n\n---\n\n![In-Game view](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b5d5cf066c9f5611ac7134b7ebc77af06254b69.png)\n\n## Design Goals\n\n* Enhance overall performance and game responsiveness\n* Improve user interface (UI) and chat readability\n* Provide practical in-game enhancements, e.g., zoom, durability tools, chat animations\n* Include optional visual enhancements such as shaders and item/tooltip improvements\n* Preserve Vanilla gameplay without interfering with server rules or game balance\n\n> The goal is to make Vanilla Minecraft **better, smoother, and more refined** while retaining its authentic feel.\n\n---\n\n## What This Modpack Provides\n\n* Performance optimizations for smoother gameplay across all systems\n* UI and HUD improvements, including clear and organized chat messages\n* Useful in-game tweaks such as Zoomify, DurabilityTooltip, and Chat Animations\n* Optional visual improvements including shader support\n* Better item and block information via Roughly Enough Items (REI) and Jade\n* World management enhancements and stability improvements\n\nAll features are **subtle**, **non-intrusive**, and **Vanilla-friendly**, providing an enhanced gameplay experience without compromising the original feel.\n\n---\n\n## Included Mod Topics\n\n* Performance & Rendering Optimizations (Lithium, Sodium, FerriteCore)\n* UI & Chat Enhancements (ChatTools, ChatAnimations, ChatPatches)\n* Item & Block Information (Roughly Enough Items, Jade)\n* World Management & Safety (Cherished Worlds, Distant Horizons)\n* Gameplay Tweaks (Zoomify, DurabilityTooltip, DefaultOptions, Tweakeroo)\n* Shader & Visual Enhancements (Iris, Blur)\n* Optional Libraries & APIs (Fabric API, Architectury, & Floppa","This mod adds the legendary cats Bingus and Floppa, who will fight for your honor","![Bingus mod logo (cool)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43a99983d3b2bd626ea0b500270f95b362818995.jpeg)\n \nBingus adds famous funny cats, Bingus and Floppa, as summonable pets that fight on your behalf.\n\n![Page Separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/632e59703cbabbd4208ff8269dede6fad09feb15.png)\n \n ![Crafting a Bingus tTotem with a diamond, 4 amethyst, and a 4 fish](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1bd193a8f865fb4e6656c1fd81ad347f0892d1cb.png)\n \nBingus Totems can be crafted using a diamond, 4 amethyst, and 4 of any fish. You spawn a Bingus from it using Mouse 2. An infinite amount of Binguses can be spawned, provided you have enough totems.\n\n[Note : in the 1.16.5 version, pink dye is used instead of amethyst.]\n\n![Page Separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/632e59703cbabbd4208ff8269dede6fad09feb15.png)\n \n![Crafting a Floppa totem with a Netherite scrap, 4 copper ingots, and 4 fish](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c7b6d45346e707f411ff90f3e99a6be3b83860a.png)\n\nFloppa Totems are crafted using a netherite scrap, 4 copper, and 4 of any fish. Summoning a Floppa works the same as a Bingus, but Floppas have increased mobility and a special shockwave attack that can launch enemies into the air. \n\n[Note : Floppas are not available in the 1.18 or 1.16 versions]\n\n![Page Separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/632e59703cbabbd4208ff8269dede6fad09feb15.png)\n\n![Bingus and Floppa party](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18ecb9722b71db1b6bcbb74e41591dae1a4a6394.jpeg)\n\nBinguses can be recalled back into their totems by right clicking them, and they will automatically recall themselves into totems upon death. Bingus Totems stack up to 8, so you can bring a decent amount with you before it begins to clutter your inventory.\n\n![Page Separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/632e59703cbabbd4208ff8269dede6fad09feb15.png)\n\n![Smelting a Bingus totem into Bingus ears](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56692ec78a450a4a9ab14c1bbc13446ae662fdc1.png)\n\nYou can cook a Bingus Totem to get Bingus Ears. Bingus Ears have the protection of a Diamond Helmet and worse durability than iron, since one diamond is used up to create them. You are also able to cook a Floppa Totem to get Floppa Ears. \n\n![Bingus ears on an armor stand and someone wearing Bingus ears](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a8f9df880b23e9f8234193972af1a1dc16b422f.jpeg)\n\n![Page Separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/632e59703cbabbd4208ff8269dede6fad09feb15.png)\n\n![An absolutely stunning photo of Bingus, painted with sheer inspiration and love](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3feff94fc4ef6f92dcbcf800814c10bd4b7a1ed.jpeg)\n\nThis mod also adds beautiful paintings of both Bingus and Floppa. CRAFT","This modpack recreate gta V in the best way possible by adding a lot of stuff.","# Overview\n\nThis modpack recreates GTA V inside Minecraft as accurately and deeply as possible. It features realistic weapons, fully functional vehicles, a GTA-style interface, advanced animations, and a complete city map already included. Designed for immersion and flexibility.\n\n---\n\n# Features\n\nCustom GTA-style main menu using FancyMenu\n\nRealistic firearms with sound effects, recoil, and animations\n\nDriveable cars, planes, tanks, ect...\n\nThird-person GTA-like camera and freecam system\n\nIn-game voice chat fully supported\n\nIntegrated minimap and GPS (via JourneyMap)\n\n\nGTA V city map included in the modpack\n\nEnhanced graphics with shader support\n\nShaders are enabled by default.\n\nCan be disabled manually if your system is not powerful enough.\n\n\n\n\n---\n\n# Installation\n\n## GTA 5 Map\n\nThe map is included with the modpack.\nIf it is missing or fails to load, you can download it manually [Here](https://mega.nz/file/ZFgEXL4A#KqcMlmjynlqWUwtdoewXDojejau39qKItB8R7j7SQAk)\n\nThe key for the mega file is :\"KqcMlmjynlqWUwtdoewXDojejau39qKItB8R7j7SQAk\"\n\nDownload GTA 5 Map\nPlace it in your saves/ folder and rename the world to exactly: GTA 5\n\n## Optional: GTA V Menu Music\n\nTo activate the original GTA V menu music, download the custom resource pack [Here](https://mega.nz/file/UBxGWYDb#JrY5fvcG6f0uBx93URNVE1nxYs7myqVWTCWlrR50lwM)\n\nThe key dor the mega file:\"JrY5fvcG6f0uBx93URNVE1nxYs7myqVWTCWlrR50lwM\"\n\nDownload GTA V Music Resource Pack\nPlace it in your resourcepacks/ folder and enable it from the Minecraft options.\n\n\n---\n\n# Warnings and Requirements\n\nHeavy modpack: Allocate at least 6 to 8 GB of RAM\n\nShaders are optional and on by default.\n\nRequires Forge 1.16.5\n\n\n---\n\n## Mod Highlights\n\n(Full mod list available in the modpack files)\n\nFancyMenu (UI and main menu customization)\n\nImmersive Vehicles + UNU Packs\n\nJourneyMap (GPS and minimap)\n\nVoice Chat Integration\n\nPlayer Animation Library, Emotecraft\n\nOculus + Embeddium (graphics performance)\n\nBetterThirdPerson, Freecam\n\nClumps, Controlling, JEI, \n\nand so much
